subject: fix: resolve remaining codebase review issues (round 3)
body:
Addresses 12 more issues from the comprehensive 48-file review.

Medium fixes:
- bulk-update: round price to 2 decimal places before sending to RPC
- bulk-update: guard against selectedFuelType becoming undefined mid-flow
- InstallPrompt: auto-hide uses session-only state instead of persisting
  dismissal — users who miss the 10s banner get it again next visit
- StationMarker: fix JSX syntax error from previous commit (comment
  outside return expression)

Refactoring:
- station/[id].tsx: break fetchStation (130 lines) into 3 focused helpers:
  fetchStationPrices, parseCoordinates, fetchPreviousPrices
- supabase-queries.test.ts: add honest disclaimer about mock-only nature,
  remove dead chainable() helper, fix bulk update return value assertion

Minor fixes:
- _layout.tsx (tabs): remove dead `tint` variable and unused Colors import
- _layout.tsx (root): lazy-load DebugPill so it's excluded from prod bundles
- DebugPill: stop animation on unmount, fix variable shadow (`t` → `scrollTimer`)

All 45 tests pass.

Tags: review, refactor, bugfix, cleanup, pwa, ui, testing
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: codebase-review
Semver: patch
